package.name: ominibot_driver
package.description: ROS 2 driver node for the CircusPi OminiBotHV mecanum motor/IMU controller board. Subscribes /cmd_vel and drives the mecanum base; reads the board feedback frame and publishes /odom (+ odom->base_link TF) and /imu. Serial protocol per OminiBotHV-master/example/OminiBot_HV_Meca.py.
